MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Donald E. Mahnke, Esq., Quill & Arrow LLP, (310) 933-4271, for Plaintiff.

Michael C. Foley, Esq., BOWMAN AND BROOKE LLP, for Defendant.

RE: PLAINTIFF CECIL RUSSELL's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Requests For Production Of Documents Set One.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem Judge. The pro tem Judge and both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

The matter is argued and submitted.

The prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem Judge at bruce.highman@highmanlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
